title: European Union (Temporary Increase of Official Controls and Emergency Measures on Imports of Food and Feed of Non-Animal Origin) (Amendment) Regulations 2026.
text:
S.I. No. 8/2026 - European Union (Temporary Increase of Official Controls and Emergency Measures on Imports of Food and Feed of Non-Animal Origin) (Amendment) Regulations 2026

16
th January,
2026.
I, MARTIN HEYDON, Minister for Agriculture, Food and the Marine, in exercise of the powers conferred on me by section 3 of the European Communities Act 1972 (No. 27 of 1972), for the purpose of giving effect to Commission Implementing Regulation (EU) 2025/1441 of 18 July 2025
, hereby make the following regulations:
1. These Regulations may be cited as the European Union (Temporary Increase of Official Controls and Emergency Measures on Imports of Food and Feed of Non-Animal Origin) (Amendment) Regulations 2026.
2. The European Union (Temporary Increase of Official Controls and Emergency Measures on Imports of Food and Feed of Non-Animal Origin) Regulations 2020 (S.I. No. 9 of 2020) are amended in Regulation 3(1), by substituting for the definition of “Regulation 2019/1793” the following –
“‘Regulation 2019/1793’ means Commission Implementing Regulation (EU) 2019/1793 of 22 October 2019 as amended by Commission Implementing Regulation (EU) 2020/625 of 6 May 2020, Commission Implementing Regulation (EU) 2020/1540 of 22 October 2020, Commission Implementing Regulation (EU) 2021/608 of 14 April 2021, Commission Implementing Regulation (EU) 2021/1900 of 27 October 2021, Commission Implementing Regulation (EU) 2021/2246 of 15 December 2021, Commission Implementing Regulation (EU) 2022/913 of 30 May 2022, Commission Implementing Regulation (EU) 2023/174 of 26 January 2023, Commission Implementing Regulation (EU) 2023/1110 of 6 June 2023, Commission Implementing Regulation (EU) 2024/286 of 16 January 2024, Commission Implementing Regulation (EU) 2024/1662 of 11 June 2024 Commission Implementing Regulation (EU) 2024/3153 of 18 December 2024 and Commission Implementing Regulation (EU) 2025/1441 of 18 July 2025;”.
3. The European Union (Temporary Increase of Official Controls and Emergency Measures on Imports of Food and Feed of Non-Animal Origin) (Amendment) Regulations 2025 (S.I. No. 101 of 2025) are revoked.
GIVEN under my Official Seal,
14 January, 2026.
MARTIN HEYDON,
Minister for Agriculture, Food and the Marine.
EXPLANATORY NOTE
This note is not part of the Instrument and does not purport to be a legal interpretation.
These Regulations update existing Regulations with regard to additional levels of controls on the import of certain food of non-animal origin from specific third countries with regard to pesticide residues and on the import of certain feed of non-animal origin from specific third countries.
1 O.J. L series 23.07.2025
